question: My course is not showing up in Canvas, what should I do?
final_answer: To resolve the issue, first check your enrollment status by visiting SIS (https://sis.jhu.edu). If you're enrolled, confirm that the course is not hidden or restricted in Canvas. If the wait exceeds 48 hours and the course still doesn't appear, contact your instructor for assistance.

plan: Check if your enrollment has been processed by SIS (https://sis.jhu.edu)
Verify that the course is not hidden or restricted in Canvas
Contact your instructor if the issue persists after 48 hours
assumptions: The student is enrolled in the course
